en: Love working with business majors economics. I you should know that mark has already taken his percentage from 60 down to 51
ko: 마크가 이미 자신의 지분을 60에서 51로 줄였다는 걸 알아야 해요.

en: Omar doesn't care about money and he needs to be protected
Desta Moskowitz owns six point eight one percent Sean Parker six point four seven percent
Would you like to use my pen Eduardo
Can you please repeat the question? Oh, it was an outrageously leading question the first time around and now you want us to hear it twice
Yes, would you read it back, please?
ko: 네, 다시 읽어 주시겠어요? 그럼 계속하세요.

en: Well, go ahead counsel. And when you sign these documents, were you aware that you were signing your own death certificate? No
ko: 변호사님, 이 문서에 서명할 때 자신의 사망 증명서에 서명하는 걸 알고 계셨나요? 아니요.

en: Was insanely stupid of me not to have my own lawyers look over all in all honesty, I thought they were my lawyers
